_schema.description: AI tool adoption rates by industry sector. Each record represents one sector survey result.

fields.sector: string — industry sector name (y-axis category label)
fields.adoption: number — percentage (0–100) of organizations in this sector using at least one AI-powered tool
fields.note: string — one-line contextual note for the tooltip; describes adoption drivers or barriers

_schema.replace: Replace 'adoption' values with your real survey percentages, 'sector' with your category names, and 'note' with any contextual annotation you want in tooltips.

data.note: Cloud-native orgs with existing ML pipelines
Driven by fraud detection and algorithmic trading
Diagnostic imaging and clinical decision support
Precision farming tools; connectivity barriers remain
